title: Cookies | PoliceStationRepUK — Find Accredited Police Station Reps

headings.text: Need a Police Station Rep in Kent?

content: Cookies PolicyLast updated: 08/03/20261. What Are Cookies1.1 Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website.1.2 They help websites remember your preferences, enable functionality, and understand how you use the site.1.3 Cookies can be "session" cookies (deleted when you close your browser) or "persistent" cookies (stored for a set period).2. How We Use Cookies2.1 Essential Cookies (Always Active)These cookies are strictly necessary for the website to function and cannot be disabled:Authentication: Keep you logged in and secure your accountSecurity: Protect against fraud, bots, and malicious activityFunctionality: Remember your preferences (e.g., cookie consent choices)Load Balancing: Ensure optimal performance and reliability2.2 Analytics Cookies (Optional - Require Consent)With your consent, we use analytics cookies to:Understand how visitors use the websiteIdentify popular pages and featuresMeasure effectiveness of content and layoutImprove user experience based on usage patternsAnalytics cookies are disabled by default. You can opt in or out at any time.2.3 We Do NOT Use:Advertising or tracking cookiesSocial media tracking pixels (unless explicitly embedded content)Third-party marketing cookies3. Specific Cookies We SetCookie NameProviderPurposeExpiryTypesessionBase44 (Auth)Authenticate users and maintain login sessionsSession (browser close)EssentialcookieConsentPoliceStationRepUKStore your cookie preference choices12 monthsEssential__cf_bmcf_clearanceCloudflareBot management, DDoS protection, and security filteringUp to 30 minutes / 30 daysEssential_ga_gid_gatGoogle AnalyticsAnonymized website usage analytics and visitor statisticsUp to 24 months / 24 hours / 1 minuteAnalytics (consent required)_gcl_auGoogle Tag ManagerUsed by Google Analytics for conversion tracking90 daysAnalytics (consent required)4. Managing Your Cookie Preferences4.1 Via Our Cookie BannerWhen you first visit the website, a cookie consent banner appears. You can:Accept all cookiesAccept only essential cookiesCustomize which types of cookies you allow4.2 Change Preferences AnytimeOpen Cookie Settings4.3 Via Your BrowserYou can also manage cookies through your browser settings:Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies and other site dataFirefox: Options → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site DataSafari: Preferences → Privacy → Manage Website DataEdge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions → Cookies and site dataNote: Blocking essential cookies may prevent core website functionality.5. Third-Party Cookies5.1 Google Analytics (Optional)Only set if you consent to analytics cookiesIP anonymization enabledNo personally identifiable information collectedData shared with Google subject to their privacy policyLearn more: Google Privacy Policy5.2 Cloudflare (Essential)Security and performance cookies required for site operationProtects against DDoS attacks and malicious botsLearn more: Cloudflare Privacy Policy5.3 Stripe (Payment Processing)Used only on payment pages for featured profile subscriptionsHelps prevent fraud and ensure secure transactionsLearn more: Stripe Privacy Policy6. Local Storage and Similar Technologies6.1 In addition to cookies, we may use HTML5 local storage for:Saving form drafts (to prevent data loss during registration)Storing user preferences locallyCaching non-sensitive data for performance6.2 Local storage data is stored on your device and not transmitted to our servers unless you actively submit a form.7. Do Not Track (DNT)7.1 We respect "Do Not Track" browser signals where technically feasible.7.2 If DNT is enabled, analytics cookies will not be set even if you previously consented.8. Updates to This Policy8.1 We may update this Cookies Policy to reflect changes in technology or legislation.8.2 Material changes will be communicated via website notice and updated "Last updated" date.8.3 Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.9. Contact UsFor questions about cookies or data privacy:Email: robertcashman@defencelegalservices.co.ukSubject: "Cookies Enquiry"For more information about how we handle your data, see our Privacy Policy and GDPR Policy.Reps DirectoryFind accredited repsBrowseStation ContactsPhone numbersSearchForms LibraryLegal aid formsAccessResourcesLegal guidanceExplore
